caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt, a black baseball cap with a logo, and headphones sits in a podcast studio. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone, with a white wall behind him featuring yellow stars and the repeated word "HUSTLE." To his right, a screen displays the words "BOSS TALK 101." The man's t-shirt features the text "CHECK IT" and "IAN" or "MAN." On-screen graphics include a logo that reads "PODCAST" and the text "BOSS TALK 101." As the scene progresses, the man speaks and looks toward someone off-camera to his right. In the final sequence, he reaches up with both hands to adjust the headphones on his head while continuing to look slightly to the side. He wears a gold chain around his neck and a watch on his left wrist.
